facilities.name: Bena Landfill
facilities.hours: Check Kern County Public Works for current Bena Landfill hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and waste class. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official county page to confirm accepted loads, payment methods, and any special handling rules before driving.

facilities.name: Roberts Lane Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check Kern County Public Works for current Roberts Lane Transfer Station hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Transfer fees vary by load type and material. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official county facility listing to confirm accepted materials, vehicle rules, and payment terms before driving.

facilities.name: Bakersfield Special Waste Facility
facilities.hours: Check Kern County Public Works for current special-waste drop-off hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste programs are generally resident-focused. Confirm eligibility and limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the official county page to confirm accepted items, packaging rules, and appointment or residency requirements before you drive.

facilities.name: Stop 'n' Shop Reuse Center
facilities.hours: Check Kern County Public Works for current Stop 'n' Shop reuse center hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Many reuse-center items are free or low-cost, but availability changes. Confirm current program rules before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside current reuse program rules
facilities.rules: Use the county page to confirm program availability, accepted items, and any resident restrictions before driving.
